workerEmploymentDetail.checklistSettingUp: Your hiring team is still setting up your checklist. Check back soon.

workerEmploymentDetail.subtitleSystemProgress: In progress with our verification partner

assignments.title: My Schedule
assignments.subtitle: Your upcoming and past shifts.
assignments.calendarEmpty: You don't have any shifts to show on the calendar.
assignments.openShiftExplainer: Your C1 recruiter or manager sets your schedule for this assignment. There are no fixed times to confirm here.
assignments.emptyNoUpcomingTitle: You don't have any upcoming shifts.
assignments.emptyNoPastSubtext: Completed and past shifts will appear here.
assignments.cancelShiftConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this shift?
assignments.cancelShiftError: Failed to cancel shift. Please try again.
assignments.cantWorkConfirm: Are you sure you can no longer work this shift? This will cancel your assignment.
assignments.cantWorkError: We could not cancel this shift. Please try again or contact your recruiter.

applications.title: My Applications
applications.emptyMessage: You haven't applied to any jobs yet.

workerAiPrescreen.title: Quick interview
workerAiPrescreen.subtitleWithJob: Complete this to move forward with this job.
workerAiPrescreen.subtitleNoJob: This helps us learn your strengths and preferences so we can match you with jobs and show employers you’re job-ready — even before you pick a specific role.
workerAiPrescreen.subtitleNoJobSecondary: It’s short, useful for your profile, and you can update answers later.
workerAiPrescreen.subtitleOptional: You can complete this short interview to help the team learn more about you. It is not required to move forward.

entryBanner.sms: You opened this from a text we sent — a few quick answers help us get you job-ready.
entryBanner.smsWithJob: Quick next step for this job — a few answers help the team consider you faster.
entryBanner.group: You opened this from a group invite — quick answers help the team consider you.
entryBanner.groupWithJob: From your group invite — a few quick answers help for this job and future matches.

workerAiPrescreen.earlyEncouragement: Nice — you're off to a good start.
workerAiPrescreen.earlyEncouragementNoJob: Nice start — this builds the profile recruiters use to match you.
workerAiPrescreen.durationHintEstimate: Usually about 3–5 minutes, depending on your answers.
workerAiPrescreen.durationHintOptionalShort: About 2–3 minutes if you complete it.
workerAiPrescreen.durationHintOptionalLong: About 3–5 minutes if you complete it.
workerAiPrescreen.durationHintOptional: About 2–3 minutes if you choose to complete it.

microConfirm.experienceDetails: Got it — that helps us understand your background.
microConfirm.workConfidence: Nice — that gives us a sense of your strengths.

v2.transitionAfterOpening: Great — next we’ll match your strengths to the right roles.
v2.transitionAfterOpeningNoJob: Great — next we’ll connect what you shared to the kinds of roles that fit you and strengthen your profile for future applications.
v2.transitionJobFit: Next are a few questions for this specific job and schedule — refinements, not repeats of what you already shared.
v2.transitionAlmostDone: Last step — just making sure we can get you placed quickly.
v2.transitionWrapUpSingleStep: Finish this last question so we can get you placed quickly.
v2.followupExperiencePrompt: Optional: add one concrete example (one sentence is enough).
v2.followupExperiencePlaceholder: Example: where you worked and what you did…
v2.followupPressurePrompt: Optional: one example of handling pressure (a sentence is fine).
v2.followupPressurePlaceholder: Brief example of how you handled pressure…
v2.followupSupervisorPrompt: Optional: one example of working with a supervisor or feedback.
v2.followupSupervisorPlaceholder: Brief example — feedback, teamwork, or communication…
v2.followupTransitionLine: Quick add-on — one or two sentences below builds on your answer above.

progressiveLead.dyn_shift_punctuality: A quick check for this shift — different from your general reliability answers above.
progressiveLead.dyn_worksite_commute: Now about this specific worksite — we’re confirming this location for this job, not your commute in general.
progressiveLead.dyn_physical_job_fit: For this role in particular — confirming the physical expectations listed for this posting.
progressiveLead.dyn_job_compliance: Just to confirm for this job:
progressiveLead.dyn_cert_have: Another requirement tied to this posting:
progressiveLead.dyn_cert_willing: If this posting requires it, would you pursue this credential?
progressiveLead.dyn_uniform_available: For this role’s dress or gear requirements:
progressiveLead.dyn_gig_path_willing: Optional path some teams use while a full-time slot opens:

workerAiPrescreen.placeholderShortAnswer: A sentence or two is fine

dynamic.dyn_shift_punctuality: This shift starts at {startTime}. Can you be on time for this start time?
dynamic.dyn_worksite_commute: This job’s worksite is in {location}. Can you get to this location reliably for this job?
dynamic.dyn_job_drug_screen: This posting requires a drug screen before you start. Are you able to complete it?
dynamic.dyn_job_background_check: This posting requires a background check. Are you able to pass and complete it?
dynamic.dyn_physical_job_fit: For this role, the work includes physical tasks like {list}. Are you comfortable with that for this posting?
dynamic.dyn_cert_have: This job requires {cert}. Do you have this certification?
dynamic.dyn_cert_willing: If you don't already have {cert}, are you willing to obtain it before or shortly after starting?
dynamic.dyn_uniform_available: This role requires {uniformText}. Do you have these available?
dynamic.dyn_gig_path_willing: We may have gig shifts available before a full-time role opens. Would you be willing to take gig shifts in the meantime?

workerAiPrescreen.signInPrompt: Sign in to complete this interview.
workerAiPrescreen.successBody1: Your answers were saved. Our team can review them with your application.
workerAiPrescreen.successBody2: What happens next: go back to your dashboard. If a recruiter needs more information, they will reach out using the contact info on your profile.
workerAiPrescreen.successBodyNoJob1: Your answers were saved to your profile. We’ll use them to suggest better job matches and help teams see you as ready to work.
workerAiPrescreen.successBodyNoJob2: Next: go back to your dashboard. When you apply to a job, employers may see this profile snapshot — keep your contact info up to date.
workerAiPrescreen.alertChooseTenant: Choose your employer in the header if job details do not appear — that helps load questions for this application.

strengthen.optionalSub: Skip this — or expand to add resume, phone, or address before you submit.
strengthen.optionalSubDone: What you finished below is saved. Submit when you’re ready.
strengthen.title: Strengthen your profile
strengthen.body: Quick wins — only if you want them. Submitting the interview is what matters most.
strengthen.skillsPickOne: Select at least one skill to add.
strengthen.skillsSaveFailed: Could not save skills. Try again.
strengthen.resumePrompt: Do you have a resume you can upload?
strengthen.resumeOnFileShort: We already have a resume on your profile.
strengthen.resumeSkippedNote: Got it — you can add a resume later from your profile.
strengthen.phoneHint: A verified phone helps employers reach you. Use the same number for texts if you opt in.
strengthen.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number (US numbers: 10 digits).
strengthen.phoneSendFailed: Could not send code. Try again.
strengthen.codeFailed: Could not verify code. Try again.
strengthen.addressFieldsRequired: Enter street, city, state, and ZIP.
strengthen.addressPreviewFirst: Look up your address first so we can confirm the map location.
strengthen.addressSaveFailed: Could not save address. Try again.

errors.planPermission: We could not load job-specific questions for your account or this application. You can still complete the rest of the interview. If this is not your application, sign in with the correct account or open the link from your message again.
errors.submitPermission: We could not save your interview — your account may not have access for this action. If you are sure you are in the right place, try again later or contact support.
errors.planInternal: Job-specific questions could not load right now (server issue). You can still complete the interview — try refreshing in a few minutes.
errors.submitInternal: We could not save your interview right now (server issue). Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.planTransient: Job-specific questions could not load (connection or server busy). You can still complete the interview — try refreshing the page in a moment.
errors.submitTransient: We could not save your interview (connection or server busy). Check your connection and tap Submit again.
errors.planGeneric: Job-specific questions could not be loaded. You can still complete the interview.
errors.submitGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

confirm_legal_first_name.prompt: Your profile shows a number where your first name should be. What is your legal first name as it appears on your ID?

opening_target_work_types.prompt: What type of work are you interested in?

opening_schedule_preferences.prompt: What kind of schedule are you open to?

opening_experience_industrial.prompt: Which types of industrial work have you done before?

opening_experience_hospitality.prompt: Which hospitality roles have you worked in?

opening_experience_events.prompt: What kind of event work have you done?

opening_experience_clerical.prompt: Which clerical or admin work have you done?

opening_experience_healthcare.prompt: Which healthcare support roles have you done?

opening_gig_types.prompt: What kinds of gig work are you open to?

motivation.prompt:
What drew you to this kind of work — and what are you hoping for next? Include:
- what kind of role or industry you want
- one goal for the next few months

experience_details.prompt:
In a few words, what kind of work have you done recently? Include:
- where (employer or type of workplace)
- about how long (approximate is fine)
- your main responsibilities

work_confidence.prompt: What kinds of work do you feel confident doing? (Select all that apply)

pressure_situation.prompt: Tell us about a time work got stressful — what happened, what did you do, and how did it turn out?

attendance_issues.prompt: Have you had attendance or lateness issues at past jobs?

attendance_explanation.prompt: If you answered Yes above, explain what happened and how you handle reliability now. If No, you may write “N/A”.

transportation_plan.prompt: Do you have a reliable way to get to work?

backup_transportation.prompt: Do you have a backup plan if your usual ride or transit is unavailable?

physical_comfort.prompt: Are you comfortable with jobs that may involve standing, lifting, or repetitive tasks?

drug_screen.prompt: If a role requires a drug screen, would anything show up that we should know about?

drug_screen_detail.prompt: You indicated something may show on a drug screen. Briefly explain what we should know (dates/context help). If you tapped Yes by mistake, go Back to change your answer.

background_check.prompt: If a role requires a background check, is there anything that might appear?

background_check_detail.prompt: You indicated something may appear on a background check. Briefly explain what we should know. If you tapped Yes by mistake, go Back to change your answer.

background_offense_class.prompt: Optional: if you shared a criminal record, was it generally a misdemeanor or a felony? (You can skip this if you prefer.)

background_offense_when.prompt: Optional: roughly when did that happen (year or timeframe)? We focus on roughly the last 7–10 years for staffing.

supervisor_feedback.prompt:
What would your last supervisor say about you? Include:
- one strength they might mention
- one area you were working on (if any)

additional_notes.prompt: Anything else you want us to know? (Optional — specific details help.)

workerSettings.notificationIntro: Choose how you want to receive notifications about your work schedule, assignments, and system updates.
workerSettings.preferredMessageLanguageSecondary: Language for SMS and email notifications.
workerSettings.marketingEmailsSecondary: Receive promotional and marketing content (e.g. Mailchimp)

workerSettings.showContactInfoSecondary: Allow others to see your email and phone number
workerSettings.showScheduleSecondary: Allow others to see your work schedule
workerSettings.dataAnalyticsSecondary: Allow us to use your data for improving our services
workerSettings.locationSharingSecondary: Share your location for work-related purposes
workerSettings.noteRequiredByRole: Note: Some settings may be required for your role and cannot be disabled. Contact your administrator if you have questions about specific settings.

apply.availableShiftsInstruction: Please apply for the shifts you are available to work. Note: Some shifts extend overnight into the next calendar day.
apply.titleTellUsAboutYou: Tell us a bit about you
apply.thanksSubmitted: Thanks — your application has been submitted!
apply.completePersonalInfo: Please complete the Personal Info step to create your account before submitting.
apply.completeRequiredItems: Please complete all required items (Drug, Background, E‑Verify, and Additional screenings) before submitting.
apply.phoneTenDigits: Enter a valid 10-digit U.S. phone number (area code + number).
apply.phoneTenDigitsHelper: 10 digits required. Numbers only; formatting is applied as you type.
apply.createPassword: Please create a password (minimum 6 characters) to continue.
apply.passwordsDontMatch: Passwords do not match. Please try again.
apply.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Please sign in instead.
apply.validateAddress: Could not validate your address. Please select an address from the dropdown suggestions to continue.
apply.completeAddress: Please enter a complete address and select from the dropdown suggestions to continue.
apply.completeAddressBeforeSubmit: Please provide and validate your complete home address before submitting.
apply.shiftConflict: You already have an active application for a shift on {date}. You can only apply to one shift per day. Please withdraw your existing application or wait for it to be processed.
apply.createPasswordSubtext: Create a password to save your progress and submit your application.
apply.last4SsnHelper: Optional. Enter the last four digits of your SSN or ITIN.
apply.last4SsnInvalid: If you enter the last four of your SSN or ITIN, it must be exactly 4 digits.
apply.confirmWorkAuthBeforeSkipEeo: Confirm your work authorization answers before skipping the optional EEO questions.
apply.optionalEeoHint: Employers may use this information for diversity reporting. You can skip this section.
apply.selectAddressFromDropdown: Please select an address from the dropdown suggestions
apply.addressErrorSelectDropdown: Could not validate address. Please select from the dropdown suggestions.
apply.addressErrorEnterValid: Could not validate address. Please enter a valid address.

apply.photoRequired: A photo is required to continue. If you already have an avatar on your profile, it will appear here automatically.
apply.failedToUploadImage: Failed to upload image. Please try again.
apply.youCanUploadOrSkip: You can upload or skip this step.
apply.resumeOptional: Resume is optional. You can skip this step and continue, or upload your resume below.
apply.uploadingNewReplaces: Uploading a new resume will replace your current resume.
apply.acceptedFormats: Accepted formats: PDF, DOCX, TXT. You can also skip this step and upload later.
apply.eVerifyDescription: This position requires that employees be E-Verified. This process involves matching your social security number with tax records and other government documents to confirm your identity. Are you comfortable with us running you through E-Verify?
apply.eVerifyDescriptionGeneric: Some roles we place may require E-Verify. This process involves matching your social security number with tax records and other government documents to confirm your identity. Are you comfortable with us running you through E-Verify if a role requires it?
apply.eVerifyComfortRequired: Please choose Yes, No, or Maybe for E-Verify to continue.
apply.drugScreeningDescription: This position requires a drug screening. Are you comfortable that you would pass a drug screening?
apply.explainDrugTest: Please explain why you might not pass a drug test
apply.backgroundScreeningDescription: This position requires a background screening. Are you comfortable that you would pass a background screening?
apply.explainBackgroundScreening: Please explain why you might not pass a background screening
apply.howWillYouGetToWork: How will you get to work?
apply.microcopyTransportation: Let us know how you plan to get to the worksite so we can help with any accommodations.
apply.settingUpPayroll: Taking you to your payroll setup…
apply.settingUpPayrollHelper: If you're not redirected automatically, you can find it later under My Payroll.
apply.hiredPayrollOptional: You can set up payroll now or finish it later — it won't stop you from selecting shifts.

apply.profileImprovementOptional: Optional — helps recruiters get to know you

apply.microcopyProfilePhoto: A profile photo helps recruiters recognize you at the worksite.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.confirmDetailsHelper: Once you confirm, you will receive all critical assignment details
jobs.noJobsFound: No jobs found matching your criteria. Try adjusting your filters or search terms.
jobs.jobPostingNotFound: We couldn't find this job posting.
jobs.applicationStatusWaitlistedHelp: You're on our shortlist. We'll contact you if a spot opens up.
jobs.applicationStatusRejectedHelp: This role has been filled or we've moved forward with other candidates.

feed.hereIsAnotherOpportunity: Nice! Here is another opportunity you may like.

jobs.youveBeenHiredAccept: You've been hired to work this job. Please click the button to Accept the position.
jobs.requirementsEligiblePercent: You are {percent}% eligible for this job

jobs.noUpcomingShifts: No upcoming shifts available at this time. New shifts are added regularly, so check back soon!
jobs.offerAckUniformAndRequirements: I understand the uniform and job requirements for this shift.
jobs.offerAckNoShowConsequence: I understand that if I fail to show up for this confirmed shift, my ability to apply for or work future shifts may be restricted for up to 2 weeks.

assignment.title: Assignment
assignment.noRecruiterAssigned: No recruiter assigned to this job order. Reach out via Inbox if you need support.

documents.subtitle: Compliance, credentials, and job files.
documents.recruiterWillRequest: Your recruiter will request anything needed.
documents.complianceDescription: Required compliance and onboarding items. Upload or complete items below. Expiration: >30 days = verified, <=30 days = expiring soon, past = expired.
documents.uploadRequiredToBeShiftReady: Upload your required documents to become shift-ready.
documents.screeningOrdersDescription: Ordered by your employer. Results appear here when updated.
documents.jobFilesDescription: Read-only files from your job orders (Staff Instructions): first day materials, site maps, safety procedures, orientation packets.
documents.noAssignmentFiles: No assignment files yet. When recruiters add documents to a job order's Staff Instructions (e.g. First Day Instructions), they'll appear here for jobs you've applied to.
documents.actionNotAvailable: This action is not available yet. Your recruiter can request documents as needed.

empty.noApplications: You haven't applied to any jobs yet. Visit the Jobs Board to find opportunities!
empty.checkJobsBoard: Browse Find Work for available shifts.

dashboard.completeApplicationHelper: You have a few requirements left for these jobs. Finish them to improve your chances.
dashboard.documentsSubtextNotStarted: Your recruiter will request anything needed
dashboard.finishProfileAlert: Finish your profile to unlock more roles.
dashboard.recommendationHeader: {count} jobs match your experience and schedule
dashboard.unlockMoreJobsBody: {count} things are preventing you from seeing more shifts.
dashboard.completeQuickSteps: Complete a few quick steps to unlock more jobs and improve your matches.
dashboard.onboardingTasksSubtitle: These are assignment onboarding items that need your attention.

actionItems.welcomeSubtitle: When something needs your attention, it will show up here.
actionItems.caughtUpBody: Nothing needs your attention right now.
actionItems.dobDescription: We use your date of birth to confirm you're eligible to work. Please make sure it matches your ID.
actionItems.dobUnder18Description: Our jobs require workers to be at least 18 years old. Please review your date of birth or contact support if this is incorrect.
actionItems.verifyPhoneDescriptionAdd: We'll text you important updates about your jobs and shifts. A valid U.S. mobile number is required.
actionItems.verifyPhoneDescriptionVerify: Enter the code we sent you to confirm your number and start receiving updates.
actionItems.taxLast4Title: Add last 4 of your SSN or ITIN
actionItems.taxLast4Description: We only need the last 4 digits to set up your tax and payroll information.
actionItems.homeAddressDescription: We use your address to match you with nearby work and make sure job details are accurate.
actionItems.emergencyContactDescription: Optional, but helpful in case we need to reach someone on your behalf during a shift.
actionItems.reEnableSmsDescription: You won't receive important job or shift updates until text alerts are turned back on.
actionItems.smsDescription: Optional — we'll send important job and shift updates directly to your phone.
actionItems.workAuthDescription: Complete a short check so we can match you to eligible shifts.
actionItems.photoDescription: A clear photo helps employers recognize you when you arrive for work.
actionItems.resumeDescription: Optional — helps recruiters see your experience faster.
actionItems.assignmentConfirmDescription: Please confirm or decline your upcoming shift.
actionItems.payrollSetupDescription: Finish your payroll setup so you can get paid. You can keep applying to shifts in the meantime.
actionItems.tempworksStartDescription: Open the link to finish setup in TempWorks. We'll save that you started so this won't look stuck while your team reviews it.
actionItems.tempworksSubmittedDescription: We're reviewing your onboarding. You can open the portal again if you need to finish or update something.
actionItems.backgroundApplicantDescription: Your background screening needs a step from you. Open your profile for the link or instructions.
actionItems.backgroundIssueDescription: There's an issue with your screening. Open your profile to see what to do next.
actionItems.drugScheduleDescription: A drug screen is required. Open your profile to schedule your appointment.
actionItems.drugRescheduleDescription: Your screening appointment was missed or must be rescheduled.
actionItems.everifyActionDescription: Your E-Verify case needs you to take the next step (for example, resolving a tentative non-confirmation).
actionItems.aiPrescreenInterviewDescription: You haven’t finished your short interview yet. Continue to pick up where you left off and keep your application moving.
actionItems.aiPrescreenProfileDescription: We need a bit more profile information before we can text you the interview link. Update your profile and wait for the next message.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.appliesTo: Applies to: C1 Staffing, LLC and its affiliates, including HRX One, HRX Companion, and related products ("we," "us," "our").
privacy.introAlert: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you visit our websites, use our applications, or engage with us as a job applicant, employee, or client.
privacy.s1P1: This Privacy Policy applies to all users of our websites, mobile applications, and related online services (collectively, the "Services"). It covers both job applicants and employees who use our platforms.
privacy.s1P2: This Policy does not apply to third-party websites or services that are linked from our platforms.
privacy.s2Intro: We collect information in three main ways:
privacy.s2L1: Information you provide directly: such as your name, contact details, resume, employment history, education, shift preferences, and other information submitted through forms or applications.
privacy.s2L2: Employment or assignment data: including job assignments, timesheets, location check-ins, payroll data, tax forms, and compliance documentation.
privacy.s2L3: Automatic data: such as device type, IP address, browser information, and usage analytics collected via cookies and similar technologies.
privacy.s2Sensitive: In some cases, we may collect sensitive information (e.g., Social Security number, driver's license, or work authorization documents) for employment verification or payroll purposes, handled under strict security and compliance controls.
privacy.s3L1: Process job applications and match you with potential opportunities
privacy.s3L2: Verify employment eligibility (e.g., I-9, E-Verify, background checks)
privacy.s3L3: Communicate about shifts, scheduling, payroll, and HR matters
privacy.s3L4: Provide, improve, and secure our Services
privacy.s3L5: Comply with legal and regulatory obligations
privacy.s3L6: Conduct analytics to improve platform performance and worker experience
privacy.s3P2: We do not sell personal information and only share data with vendors who help us deliver employment-related or operational functions.
privacy.s4L1: Clients and hiring partners to facilitate job placements or assignments.
privacy.s4L2: Service providers (e.g., payroll processors, background check partners, cloud hosting, and IT security vendors) who perform services on our behalf.
privacy.s4L3: Regulatory authorities as required by law or government request.
privacy.s4P2: All third-party vendors are bound by confidentiality and data protection obligations consistent with applicable law.
privacy.s5P1: We use cookies, pixels, and analytics tools to understand how users interact with our websites and apps, improve performance, and enhance usability.
privacy.s5P2: You can control or disable cookies through your browser settings, though some features of the site may not function properly without them.
privacy.s6Intro: Where applicable law requires a legal basis, we process your personal information based on:
privacy.s6L1: Your consent (for example, when you agree to receive SMS messages)
privacy.s6L2: Performance of a contract (e.g., your employment agreement)
privacy.s6L3: Compliance with legal obligations (e.g., tax, payroll, labor regulations)
privacy.s6L4: Legitimate interests (e.g., platform security, service improvement)
privacy.s7P1: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, access controls, and data minimization to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction.
privacy.s7P2: Access to sensitive data (such as SSNs) is restricted to authorized personnel and is stored in compliance with applicable data protection laws.
privacy.s8P1: We retain personal data only as long as necessary for employment, business, or legal purposes. Retention periods vary by data type and legal requirement (e.g., payroll records may be retained longer for compliance reasons).
privacy.s9Intro: Depending on your location, you may have rights to:
privacy.s9L1: Access, correct, or delete your personal information
privacy.s9L2: Request a copy of the information we hold about you
privacy.s9L3: Opt out of certain communications or data uses
privacy.s9L4: Not be discriminated against for exercising privacy rights
privacy.s9P2: To exercise these rights, contact us at
privacy.s9P3: We may need to verify your identity before fulfilling your request.
privacy.s10P1: Our Services are not directed to children under 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from minors without appropriate consent.
privacy.s11P1: If you access our Services from outside the United States, be aware that your data may be processed and stored in the U.S., where data protection laws may differ from those in your jurisdiction.
privacy.s12P1: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. When we make material changes, we will post the updated version on this page and update the "Last Updated" date above. Continued use of our Services after updates constitutes acceptance of the revised Policy.
privacy.s13P1: For privacy questions, requests, or complaints, please contact:

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.appliesTo: Applies to: C1 Staffing, LLC and its affiliates, including HRX One, HRX Companion, and related products ("we," "us," "our").
terms.introAlert: These Terms govern your access to and use of our websites, mobile applications, and related services. By creating an account or using our platform, you agree to these Terms of Use.
terms.s1P1: By accessing or using any part of the C1 Staffing or HRX One platforms (collectively, the "Services"), you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Use and our
terms.s1P1Consent: SMS and Mobile Communications Consent Agreement
terms.s1P2: If you do not agree, do not access or use our Services. If you are accessing the Services on behalf of a company or organization, you represent that you are authorized to bind that entity to these Terms.
terms.s2P1: You must be at least 16 years old (or the age of majority in your jurisdiction, if higher) to use our Services. Some job assignments may require a higher minimum age as required by law.
terms.s2P2: By registering, you represent that the information you provide is true, accurate, and complete, and that you will maintain it accordingly.
terms.s3P1: To access certain features, you must create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activity under your account.
terms.s3P2: You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized access or breach of your account. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate any account that violates these Terms or is otherwise deemed insecure or fraudulent.
terms.s4P1: By creating an account, you consent to receive communications electronically, including via email, SMS, and mobile notifications, as described in our
terms.s4P1Consent: SMS and Mobile Communications Consent Agreement
terms.s4P1B: . You may withdraw certain consents as permitted by law, though doing so may limit your ability to use certain features.
terms.s5L1: Use the Services only for lawful purposes related to job seeking, employment, scheduling, and communication with us.
terms.s5L2: Do not impersonate another person or entity or misrepresent your affiliation.
terms.s5L3: Do not upload, transmit, or distribute any harmful, fraudulent, or unlawful material.
terms.s5L4: Do not attempt to access data or systems you are not authorized to access.
terms.s5L5: Do not interfere with or disrupt the security, integrity, or performance of the Services.
terms.s5P2: We reserve the right to monitor, moderate, and remove content or access at our sole discretion to maintain platform integrity and compliance.
terms.s6P1: Your use of the platform does not in itself create an employment relationship. If you are hired or assigned to a client, your employment status, pay, and terms are governed by your separate employment documents with C1 Staffing or the relevant employer of record.
terms.s6P2: Nothing in these Terms guarantees a job, assignment, or continued employment.
terms.s7P1: All content, code, trademarks, logos, and other intellectual property in or related to the Services are owned or licensed by us and protected under applicable intellectual property laws.
terms.s7P2: You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access and use the Services for lawful purposes. No rights are transferred to you except as expressly stated.
terms.s8P1: If you submit, upload, or post any information (such as resumes, feedback, or profile data), you grant us a worldwide, royalty-free, sublicensable license to use, host, display, and process such content solely to operate and improve our Services.
terms.s8P2: You remain responsible for the accuracy and legality of the content you provide.
terms.s9P1B: explains how we collect, use, and share your information. By using our Services, you consent to our data practices as described therein.
terms.s10P1: The Services may link to third-party websites or integrate with third-party systems (such as payroll, identity verification, or messaging providers). We are not responsible for the content or practices of any third party. Your use of such services is governed by their terms.
terms.s11P1: We may suspend or terminate your access to the Services at any time, with or without notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms or is otherwise harmful to other users or to us.
terms.s11P2: You may deactivate your account at any time by contacting

terms.s12P2: We do not guarantee employment or placement. Use of the platform is at your own risk.
terms.s13P1: To the fullest extent permitted by law, we and our affiliates shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, consequential, special, or punitive damages arising from or relating to your use of the Services, even if advised of the possibility of such damages.
terms.s13P2: Our total liability for any claim arising out of or relating to these Terms or your use of the Services shall not exceed one hundred U.S. dollars (US $100).
terms.s14P1: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless C1 Staffing, HRX One, and their officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims, losses, liabilities, damages, or expenses (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising from your violation of these Terms or misuse of the Services.

terms.s15P2: Except where prohibited by law, disputes will be resolved through binding arbitration administered by the American Arbitration Association (AAA) under its Commercial Arbitration Rules. You and we waive the right to a jury trial or to participate in a class action.

terms.s17L3: These Terms constitute the entire agreement between you and us regarding the Services.

consent.title: SMS and Mobile Communications Consent Agreement
consent.appliesTo: Applies to: C1 Staffing, LLC and its affiliates, including HRX One, HRX Companion, and related products ("we," "us," "our").
consent.summaryBody: By creating an account and selecting "I agree" during sign up, you consent to receive text messages (SMS/MMS), emails, and mobile app notifications about job opportunities, scheduling, onboarding, payroll, and related employment communications. Message & data rates may apply. Reply STOP to unsubscribe from SMS. You can manage push notifications in your device settings.
consent.s1P1: This Consent authorizes us to send you communications via SMS/MMS text messages, email, and mobile app push notifications relating to your application, job opportunities, onboarding, scheduling, timekeeping, payroll, benefits, HR updates, security alerts (including multi-factor codes), and other communications relevant to your engagement with us.
consent.s1P2: Consent to receive these messages is not a condition of applying for or obtaining employment. Where required, we may obtain separate consent for any marketing communications unrelated to your employment or job search.
consent.s2Intro: You may receive, including but not limited to:
consent.s2L1: Job openings, shift offers, assignment confirmations, and schedule changes
consent.s2L2: Onboarding tasks, document reminders, I-9/E-Verify and compliance notices
consent.s2L3: Timecard reminders, payroll notices, and benefits updates
consent.s2L4: Account security alerts, verification codes, and app/service updates
consent.s2L5: Operational announcements required for workplace safety or policy changes
consent.s2P2: We will not send unrelated promotional/marketing messages without a separate, explicit opt-in.
consent.s3P1: Message frequency varies based on your activity, location, and assignments, and may include multiple messages per week during active periods (e.g., onboarding or scheduled shifts).
consent.s4P1: Message and data rates may apply according to your mobile plan and carrier. Carriers are not liable for delayed or undelivered messages. Availability may vary by carrier and device.
consent.s5L1: SMS: You can opt out at any time by replying STOP to any text message from us. To get help, reply HELP.
consent.s5L2: Push Notifications: Manage or disable notifications in your device settings or in the app notification preferences.
consent.s5L3: Email: You may adjust email preferences using links in the footer where available. We may still send transactional or legally required emails.
consent.s5P2: Opting out of SMS or push notifications will not stop communications we are legally permitted or required to send by email or within your account.
consent.s6P1: For assistance with messaging, contact us at
consent.s7P1: By creating an account and selecting "I agree" on the sign-up screen, you confirm that (i) you are the owner or authorized user of the phone number and email you provide; (ii) you authorize us to contact you as described in this Consent; and (iii) you understand you may revoke consent at any time using the methods above.
consent.s7P2: If your phone number or email changes, you agree to update your account information promptly to help ensure accurate delivery of communications.
consent.s8P1: We handle your personal information in accordance with our
consent.s9P1: We may update this Consent from time to time. The "Last Updated" date above will reflect the latest version. Material changes will be posted in the app or website. Continued use of our services after an update constitutes acknowledgment of the updated Consent.
consent.s10P1: We maintain a record of your consent (including date/time, device, IP, and user account) for compliance purposes. You may request a copy of your consent record by contacting
consent.s11P1: This Consent is intended to comply with applicable laws and carrier policies, including the Telephone Consumer Protection Act (TCPA) and relevant state privacy laws. If any provision is found unenforceable in a particular jurisdiction, it will be enforced to the maximum extent permitted, and the remainder will continue in effect.

smsPrivacy.title: SMS/Text Messaging & Mobile Communications Privacy Notice
smsPrivacy.appliesTo: Applies to: C1 Staffing, LLC and its affiliates, including HRX One, HRX Companion, and related products ("we," "us," "our").
smsPrivacy.introP1: This SMS/Text Messaging & Mobile Communications Privacy Notice (the "Notice") supplements the Privacy Policy of C1 Staffing, LLC and its affiliates, including HRX One and HRX Companion and explains how we collect and use information in connection with SMS/text messaging, mobile alerts, and mobile app notifications (collectively, "Mobile Communications").
smsPrivacy.introP2: This Notice applies to job applicants, employees, contractors, and platform users who enroll in or otherwise receive Mobile Communications from us.
smsPrivacy.s1Title: 1. Information We Collect for Mobile Communications
smsPrivacy.s1Intro: When you provide your mobile number or enable mobile notifications, we may collect and store:
smsPrivacy.s1L2: The date, time, and content of messages sent or received
smsPrivacy.s1L4: Your device type and carrier information
smsPrivacy.s1L5: Your communication preferences and opt-in/opt-out status
smsPrivacy.s1P2: We do not collect the contents of replies beyond what is necessary for operational purposes (for example, STOP, HELP, or message responses).
smsPrivacy.s2Title: 2. How We Use Mobile Communication Data
smsPrivacy.s2L1: Send job-related, onboarding, scheduling, payroll, and employment notifications
smsPrivacy.s2L2: Provide account security alerts and verification codes
smsPrivacy.s2L4: Maintain compliance records for consent, delivery, and opt-out activity
smsPrivacy.s2L5: Troubleshoot delivery errors and improve our messaging system
smsPrivacy.s2P2: We do not sell or rent your phone number or messaging data.
smsPrivacy.s2P3: We will not send unrelated marketing content unless you separately and explicitly opt-in to receive it.
smsPrivacy.s3P1: Where required by law, we rely on your express consent to send Mobile Communications.
smsPrivacy.s3Intro: Consent is typically obtained when you:
smsPrivacy.s3L1: Check the box agreeing to SMS during account creation, or
smsPrivacy.s3L2: Otherwise provide your mobile number and agree to receive communications
smsPrivacy.s3P2: Consent is not required as a condition of applying for or accepting employment.
smsPrivacy.s3P3: You may withdraw consent at any time by replying STOP.
smsPrivacy.s4Title: 4. How to Opt-Out or Get Help
smsPrivacy.s4L1: To stop receiving SMS messages, reply STOP to any message from us.
smsPrivacy.s4L2: To receive assistance, reply HELP or email
smsPrivacy.s4P2: After opting out, you may still receive legally-required or service-essential messages through other channels such as email or in-app notifications.
smsPrivacy.s4P3: Carriers are not liable for delayed or undelivered messages.
smsPrivacy.s5P1: Message frequency varies and may increase during onboarding, scheduling, or active assignments.
smsPrivacy.s5P2: Message and data rates may apply according to your mobile plan and carrier.
smsPrivacy.s6P1: We store Mobile Communication data securely using industry-standard safeguards.
smsPrivacy.s6P2: Opt-in and opt-out records may be retained for compliance purposes such as proving consent under the Telephone Consumer Protection Act (TCPA) or carrier policies.
smsPrivacy.s6P3: Other message data is retained only as long as reasonably necessary to operate our Services or comply with applicable laws.
smsPrivacy.s7P1: Your personal information is handled in accordance with our full Privacy Policy, including your rights to access, correct, or delete information where applicable.
smsPrivacy.s7P2: For details, please review our full Privacy Policy at:
smsPrivacy.s8P1: We may update this Notice from time to time. The "Last Updated" date indicates the most recent revision. Material changes will be posted in our app or website.
smsPrivacy.s8P2: Continued use of our Services after an update constitutes acknowledgment of the revised Notice.
smsPrivacy.s9P1: If you have questions or concerns regarding Mobile Communications or privacy, contact us at:

avatarVerification.checkingFull: We're checking your profile photo. This usually takes a few seconds.
avatarVerification.approvedAlert: Your profile photo is verified — you're all set to apply for and confirm shifts.
avatarVerification.errorRetry: We couldn't check your photo. Please try uploading it again.
avatarVerification.gateMissing: Add a profile photo before confirming this shift. Open your profile to take a quick selfie.
avatarVerification.gateRejectedGeneric: Your profile photo needs a retake before you can confirm this shift.

rejection.no_face: We couldn't find a face in your photo. Please retake with your face clearly visible.
rejection.multiple_faces: Your photo shows more than one person. Please retake with just you in the frame.
rejection.face_too_small: Your face is too small in the frame. Hold the camera closer so your face fills most of the photo.
rejection.too_blurry: Your photo looks blurry. Please retake with a steady hand in good light.
rejection.too_dark: Your photo is too dark. Please retake in better lighting — natural daylight works best.
rejection.inappropriate: Your photo was flagged for review. Please upload a clear, professional headshot.
rejection.manual_override: A recruiter asked you to reupload your photo. Please take a new, clear headshot.
rejection.verification_error: We couldn't check your photo right now. Please try uploading again in a moment.
